Model outputs plain CSV lines, no HTML, no <table>, no alignment (numbers left-aligned in text), no visual table structure. Step 3: Evaluate naturalness (tone, conciseness, professional quality). Output is concise, clean text without fluff, professional in data presentation, and readable as a list. No awkward phrasing or excess. Suitable for structural task, though lacks polish of a true table. Score: 4/5.

Overall: Model cleans data accurately but fails core "table" conversion, hurting formatting most.
